name: Indian Institute of Technology Bombay
about: Established in 1958, the Indian Institute of Technology Bombay (IITB) is one of the premier public engineering and research institutions in the world. Located in Powai, Mumbai, it is renowned for its state-of-the-art research facilities, highly selective admissions, and outstanding placement records. IIT Bombay has evolved from a regional institute into a globally recognized leader in technical education, engineering sciences, and entrepreneurship.

reviews.author: Aniket Sharma
reviews.text: Living and learning at Powai has been the defining experience of my life. The coding culture is outstanding, classes are rigorous, and peer learning is top-notch. Campus sits between Powai Lake and Vihar Lake, giving a scenic look in Mumbai. Infrastructure is stellar, though hostel rooms are slightly compact.

reviews.author: Priya Iyer
reviews.text: IDC School of Design at IIT Bombay is an incredible place for creative freedom. You collaborate with engineers on projects, which gives a unique multi-disciplinary flavor. Best labs and machinery. Mess food is standard, average but edible.

name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi
about: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi is a public research university located in Hauz Khas, Delhi. Founded in 1961, it was formally declared an Institution of National Importance under the Institutes of Technology Act. IIT Delhi's strategic location in the national capital fosters massive corporate collaborations and public policy research hubs, consistently placing it among India's elite academic powerhouses.

reviews.author: Rohit Verma
reviews.text: Superb academic culture. Hauz Khas location means you have infinite food and social hangouts nearby. Highly demanding curriculum, but you get to learn from the brightest minds. Placements are extremely robust and smooth.

name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras
about: The Indian Institute of Technology Madras is a public technical university located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. It has been ranked as the #1 engineering institute in India by the National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) consistently for several years. Nestled in a lush green campus that was formerly part of the Guindy National Park, IIT Madras is prominent for its massive Research Park, incubating over 300 deep-tech startups.

courses.name: Dual Degree (B.Tech + M.Tech) in Data Science

reviews.author: Karthik Raja
reviews.text: Ranked #1 for a reason. IIT Madras provides an unparalleled academic biosphere. The campus is basically a forest filled with deer and monkeys, which is amazing to see right inside a major city. Research Park access is an absolute gamechanger for startups.

name: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli
about: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli, also known as NIT Trichy, is a public technical and research university near the city of Tiruchirappalli in Tamil Nadu, India. Founded in 1964 as Regional Engineering College Tiruchirappalli, it is the top-ranked NIT under NIRF, celebrating outstanding core placements and academic excellence.

reviews.author: Venkat R.
reviews.text: The culture at NITT is extremely driven. Pragyan (techno-management fest) and Festember (cultural fest) are legendary. Placements are almost equal to new IITs, and the vast alumni network is highly supportive.

name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani
about: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) is a private deemed university and an Institution of Eminence located in Pilani, Rajasthan. BITS is highly famous for its strict 'No Reservation' policy, its unique Practice School (compulsory corporate internships), and its legendary zero-attendance rule, which fosters stellar startup founders and self-motivated engineers.

reviews.author: Siddharth Goel
reviews.text: Zero attendance policy is real and forces you to grow up and manage your own time. The tech and startup ecosystem is world-class; BITSians are everywhere in tech. Fees are on the higher side but the ROI is easily justified via Practice School placements.

name: Manipal Institute of Technology
about: Manipal Institute of Technology (MIT), established in 1957, is a constituent college of Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE). It is highly appreciated for its world-class hostel infrastructure, diverse international exchange programs, vibrant extracurricular scene, and premium research opportunities in coastal Karnataka.

reviews.author: Sameer K.
reviews.text: Campus life at Manipal is unrivaled in India. Student activities, tech clubs, and international collaborations are abundant. The infrastructure feels like a Western university. Academics are decent, and top MNCs regularly visit the campus.

name: Vellore Institute of Technology
about: Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT) is a private deemed university located in Vellore, Tamil Nadu. Founded in 1984, it has expanded into one of India's largest engineering schools, utilizing a unique Fully Flexible Credit System (FFCS) allowing students to select their own classes and faculty schedules.

reviews.author: Rahul Nair
reviews.text: The student crowd at VIT is massive, which creates high competition. Fully Flexible Credit System (FFCS) is great, but getting your desired slot is like a fast-finger contest. Infrastructure and labs are excellent. Strict rules regarding outtimes.

name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology
about: SRM Institute of Science and Technology, formerly SRM University, is a private deemed university located in Kattankulathur, near Chennai. Boasting an ultra-modern campus featuring a hospital and its own metro connection nearby, SRM hosts thousands of students across different branches of research.

reviews.author: Ayush Mishra
reviews.text: SRM offers massive scope for networking since the student community is huge. The campus has everything you could need, from food courts to printing centers. Placements are massive but highly competitive due to mass recruiting.

name: Christ University
about: Christ University is a private deemed-to-be university located in Bengaluru, Karnataka. Established in 1969 by St. Kuriakose Elias Chavara, it is highly renowned for its rigorous academic schedules, strict dress codes, and outstanding corporate placements in Commerce, Management, and Humanities fields.

reviews.author: Riya George
reviews.text: Extremely strict rules (85% attendance, formal clothes are mandatory every day), but it prepares you exceptionally well for corporate life. The brand value of Christ is unbeatable for finance and consulting in South India.

name: Symbiosis International University
about: Symbiosis International University is a multi-campus private deemed university based in Pune, India. Guided by the principles of 'Vasudhaiva Kutumbakam' (the world is one family), Symbiosis is highly acclaimed for its media, design, business, and law programs, which foster huge global corporate connectivity.

reviews.author: Vikram Sen
reviews.text: Lavale hilltop campus in Pune is breathtaking. High quality peer network. Placement cells are incredibly active and the corporate branding gets top tier firms in the campus. A truly premium ecosystem.

name: National Law School of India University
about: The National Law School of India University (NLSIU) is the premier public law school located in Nagarbhavi, Bengaluru. Ranked as the #1 Law institute under NIRF without exception, it is highly recognized for its rigorous tri-mester system and for shaping legal thinkers, policy analysts, and top corporate litigators.

reviews.author: Anjali Deshmukh
reviews.text: The Harvard of the East for legal studies. Trimester system is highly demanding and keeps you working constantly, but the level of debate, case studies, and corporate networking is incomparable. Literally 100% of major law firms recruit here.

name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi
about: All India Institute of Medical Sciences New Delhi is a public medical research university and hospital based in New Delhi. Ranked consistently as the #1 medical college in India, AIIMS Delhi provides top-tier medical education, fully-funded clinical research hubs, and subsidised healthcare to millions of citizens.

courses.name: Bachelor of Medicine & Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS)

reviews.author: Dr. Aarav Mehta
reviews.text: Admissions are extremely tough, but once inside, the fees are practically free (Rs. 1,600 per year) and clinical exposure is massive. You treat cases that other medical students only read about in textbooks. Outstanding campus.

name: Christian Medical College Vellore
about: Christian Medical College Vellore, widely known as CMC Vellore, is a private, minority-run medical school and research institute in Vellore, Tamil Nadu. Established in 1900, it is famous for pioneering major medical milestones in India, including the first open-heart surgery and kidney transplants.

courses.name: Bachelor of Medicine & Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS)

reviews.author: Dr. Sarah John
reviews.text: Highly service-oriented medical training. CMC teaches you to treat patient care with deep empathy. Excellent hospital wards, highly dedicated faculty, and amazing community health initiatives.

name: St. Stephen's College
about: St. Stephen's College is a constituent college of the University of Delhi. Founded in 1881, it is one of the oldest and most prestigious institutions for liberal arts and science in India, producing prominent diplomats, politicians, and writers.

reviews.author: Kabir Thapar
reviews.text: St. Stephen's is a brand in itself. The discussion culture in the dining hall, the Stephanian heritage, and the top consulting roles available during placements make this place stellar.

name: Miranda House
about: Miranda House is a premier women's college of the University of Delhi. Established in 1948, it is renowned for top science and arts programs, consistently securing the #1 college spot under NIRF rankings for several consecutive years.

reviews.author: Shristi Das
reviews.text: Ranked #1 for a reason! Miranda House offers an highly empowering atmosphere for women. Excellent library, beautiful red-brick campus architecture, and very active political and debate societies.

name: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad
about: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIMA) is a top-ranked business school situated in Ahmedabad, Gujarat. Established in 1961, it is world-renowned for its rigorous case-study method of teaching and for nurturing global corporate titans and stellar policy minds.

reviews.author: Nikhil Rao
reviews.text: The Red Brick Campus of IIMA is the holy grail of management. Highly intensive case-study based curriculum. You sleep 4 hours a night due to projects, but it builds absolute business resilience. 100% top tier consulting roles.

name: Indian Institute of Management Bangalore
about: Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIMB) is a leading public business school in Bengaluru, Karnataka. Renowned for its stone-architecture campus and powerful focus on tech entrepreneurship and corporate strategy, IIMB is a global benchmark for management studies.

courses.name: Post Graduate Programme in Enterprise Management

reviews.author: Meghana S.
reviews.text: Stunning stone campus that has been the set of many films! Extreme focus on academic standards and analytics. Being in Bangalore, the tech and startup network you access is unparalleled.

name: National Institute of Fashion Technology Delhi
about: National Institute of Fashion Technology Delhi is the premier fashion and apparel design institute in India. Established in 1986 in collaboration with FIT New York, NIFT Delhi serves as the creative design epicenter under the Ministry of Textiles.

courses.name: Bachelor of Design (B.Des) in Fashion Design

reviews.author: Tanya Sen
reviews.text: Incredible creative energy. The campus acts as a constant fashion ramp. Intense studio hours, jury weeks are sleepless but teach you deep presentation skills. Direct industry exposure to top Indian designers.

name: National Institute of Design Ahmedabad
about: The National Institute of Design (NID) Ahmedabad is internationally acclaimed for industrial, communication, textile, and IT integrated design. Established in 1961 as an autonomous institute under the Ministry of Commerce and Industry, NID is globally recognized for product engineering and semantic design logic.

courses.name: Master of Design (M.Des) in Product Design

reviews.author: Vikram Rathore
reviews.text: NID offers an unparalleled learning experience. It is fully hands-on; we barely have exams, only evaluations based on physical and digital portfolios. Collaboration with global tech giants is a standard part of product curriculum.

name: MICA Ahmedabad
about: MICA Ahmedabad (formerly Mudra Institute of Communications, Ahmedabad) is the premier business school in India dedicated specifically to strategic marketing and communication. Established in 1991, its gorgeous green campus hosts creatives, marketers, and advertising strategy minds.

reviews.author: Anjali Bose
reviews.text: The Mecca of Marketing. MICA teaches you to marry analytical data with creative design thinking. If you are passionate about advertising, luxury brand management, or media research, there is no better place in Asia.

name: Ashoka University
about: Ashoka University is a pioneer private liberal arts university located in Rajiv Gandhi Education City, Sonepat. Founded as a collaborative philanthropic initiative, Ashoka focuses heavily on critical thinking, writing, and interdisciplinary learning options.

reviews.author: Dhruv Sen
reviews.text: Highly intellectual and open culture. Classes are built around discussion rather than rote memorization. The campus facilities are premium, and recruiters value the writing and presentation skills Ashoka students possess.

name: Azim Premji University
about: Azim Premji University was established in Bengaluru as a non-profit university in 2010. Sponsored by the Azim Premji Foundation, the university has a clear social mandate to facilitate education and development in underserved regions of India.

reviews.author: Meera Nair
reviews.text: A wonderful non-profit environment. If you want to build a career in NGOs, public policy, or rural educational upliftment, this is the prime choice in India. Financial aids are incredibly generous.

name: FLAME University
about: FLAME University was founded as an anchor institution for liberal education in India. Located in Pune, FLAME provides interdisciplinary courses combining design, arts, natural sciences, and media to build diverse portfolios.

reviews.author: Neil D.
reviews.text: The sports infrastructure here is premium - 18-hole golf course inside campus! Very supportive environment for exploring subjects before picking majors. Great corporate connections for media roles.

name: Shiv Nadar University
about: Shiv Nadar University is a private research-backed university founded by the HCL Foundation. Nestled in Greater Noida, the university emphasizes advanced research programs and engineering sciences.

reviews.author: Ayush Gupta
reviews.text: Highly equipped labs. Shiv Nadar provides huge funding for student research projects (OUR Program). The campus is isolated but extremely peaceful and self-sufficient.

name: O.P. Jindal Global University
about: O.P. Jindal Global University is a philanthropic private university established in 2009. Recognized as an Institution of Eminence, its Jindal Global Law School (JGLS) is ranked among the finest legal colleges globally.

reviews.author: Karan Malhotra
reviews.text: The law school is premium. Extremely global faculty with top qualifications. The campus feels like a high-end corporate park. Fees are very high, but if you want global legal exposure, it is worth the cost.

name: National Institute of Technology Warangal
about: Established in 1959 as the first regional engineering college in India, NIT Warangal is globally recognized for its highly selective admissions, demanding technical programs, and outstanding core engineering research. The campus has world-class infrastructure and top-tier computing facilities.

reviews.author: Srikanth Reddy
reviews.text: Academic rigour is very high. Campus culture is super tech-oriented and placements are exceptional for the CSE branch.

name: National Institute of Technology Karnataka, Surathkal
about: NITK Surathkal is a premier public engineering institution situated on the shore of the Arabian Sea. Renowned for its private beach, incredible marine research facilities, and excellent record of students entering top tier tech organizations.

reviews.author: Nihal Shetty
reviews.text: Having our own private beach is the highlight of college life. Beyond the fun, the placement statistics are absolutely outstanding.

name: National Institute of Technology Calicut
about: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NITC) is a prestigious technical university located in the foothills of the Western Ghats in Kerala. It offers world-class lab spaces and comprehensive engineering degrees.

reviews.author: Anjali Nair
reviews.text: Lush green campus. Very peaceful campus environment. Placements are stable and campus host multiple national level tech festivals.

name: International Institute of Information Technology Hyderabad
about: IIIT Hyderabad is a private deemed university renowned for its rigorous research curriculum, global contributions in Computer Vision, and highly selective admissions. Its coding culture is considered the finest in India, frequently producing top ACM-ICPC regional and global teams.

reviews.author: Rohan Gupta
reviews.text: Academic load is massive, but the coding culture is elite. If you want to excel in algorithms or deep artificial intelligence, there is no place better in the country.

name: Delhi Technological University
about: Delhi Technological University (formerly Delhi College of Engineering) is a premier public university in Rohini, Delhi. Renowned for its rich industrial legacy, outstanding placements, and extremely vibrant student-driven tech teams.

reviews.author: Ayush Singhal
reviews.text: DTU is legendary for its alumni network and tech teams (like Defy Gravity). Placement season brings practically every major company to campus.

name: College of Engineering Pune
about: Established in 1854, COEP Pune is the third oldest engineering college in Asia. Located in Pune (the 'Oxford of the East'), it has a rich history of outstanding engineering research, active student clubs, and close ties to Maharashtra's automotive and manufacturing corridors.

reviews.author: Tanmay Kulkarni
reviews.text: COEP has unmatched heritage. Being in the heart of Pune is incredibly helpful for internships and core manufacturing job networks.

name: PSG College of Technology
about: PSG College of Technology is a government-aided private engineering college located in Peelamedu, Coimbatore. Renowned for its highly proactive industry-institute collaboration, standard modern laboratories, and strong textile & manufacturing networks.

reviews.author: Vignesh Kumar
reviews.text: PSG is an institution with unparalleled focus on industry placements. Highly rigorous labs.

name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology
about: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology is a premier private deemed university in Patiala, Punjab. Renowned for its world-class modular hostel blocks, comprehensive industry research, and massive core software placements.

reviews.author: Manpreet Singh
reviews.text: The hosteling facilities at Thapar are legendary. It has a beautiful campus layout and placements are robust, especially for software courses.

name: Kasturba Medical College Manipal
about: Kasturba Medical College (KMC) Manipal is one of the premier private medical institutions in India. Established in 1953, it is world-renowned for its outstanding diagnostic laboratories, extensive clinical practice wards, and premium international internship exchange options.

reviews.author: Dr. Kritika Sen
reviews.text: Exceptional clinical diagnostics environment. You get to consult on complex clinical issues early in your coursework.

name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research
about: JIPMER is a premier national public medical school and hospital in Puducherry. As an Institution of National Importance, JIPMER offers heavily subsidized medical education with highly intensive clinical workloads and premier residency networks.

reviews.author: Dr. Vivek Nair
reviews.text: Highly rigorous academic schedule. Excellent diagnostic lab infrastructure, and incredibly massive patient footfall.

name: Kasturba Medical College Mangalore
about: Kasturba Medical College Mangalore is a constituent college of MAHE. Highly praised for its excellent clinical facilities and strong corporate integrations across coastal Karnataka.

reviews.author: Dr. Pranav Hegde
reviews.text: Mangalore offers premium clinical opportunities. KMC has outstanding diagnostic environments.

name: Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research
about: Sri Ramachandra Medical College is a premier private university in Chennai. It offers state of the art hospital services and highly integrated health sciences programs.

reviews.author: Dr. Vignesh Balaji
reviews.text: Stellar campus layout and outstanding diagnostic infrastructure. Hospital block is very vast.

name: Indian Institute of Management Calcutta
about: IIM Calcutta (IIMC) is the first IIM in India. Renowned for its outstanding quantitative finance coursework, classic lakeside campus ('Joka'), and elite placement records in global investment banks.

reviews.author: Animesh Roy
reviews.text: Joka is beautiful with its seven lakes. If you want to do finance or consulting, this is the holy grail.

name: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow
about: IIM Lucknow is a premier business school located in the historical city of Lucknow. Renowned for its rigorous academic curriculum, beautiful heritage campus, and top corporate finance placement index.

reviews.author: Shweta Verma
reviews.text: Highly rigorous management programs. The placement cell is incredibly active and helps you secure top positions.

name: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode
about: Situated on two scenic hilltops in Kozhikode, Kerala, IIMK is celebrated as one of the most picturesque campuses in India. It is a pioneer in gender diversity and strategic business leadership programs.

reviews.author: Meera Krishnan
reviews.text: Living on the 'Kumpus' hilltops is a surreal experience. Peer diversity is outstanding.

name: XLRI — Xavier School of Management
about: XLRI Jamshedpur is the oldest business school in India. It is universally acknowledged as the absolute finest institution for Human Resource Management (HRM) in the country, fostering generations of corporate leaders.

reviews.author: Aniket Goel
reviews.text: The culture of XLRI is defined by 'XL Culture' — high integration and humility. Placements for HRM are unmatched in Asia.

name: S.P. Jain Institute of Management and Research
about: SPJIMR is a premier business school in the heart of Mumbai. Renowned for its unique social value-driven curriculum (DOCC and Abhyudaya initiatives) and outstanding record in Marketing and Finance placements.

reviews.author: Vikash Jain
reviews.text: The focus on ethics and societal impact sets SPJIMR apart. Marketing roles offered are best in the country.

name: Management Development Institute
about: Management Development Institute Gurugram (MDI) is a premier private business school in the corporate hub of Haryana. MDI offers outstanding placements in consulting and finance.

reviews.author: Shruti Aggarwal
reviews.text: The campus in Gurgaon gives immense exposure to corporate leaders. Placements are extremely structured and stable.

name: Institute of Management Technology
about: IMT Ghaziabad is one of the premier private management institutions in India, famous for its quantitative marketing coursework, active corporate connect, and large sales management placement network.

reviews.author: Anuj Saxena
reviews.text: If you want a core career in sales and marketing management, IMT's academic ecosystem is world-class.

name: NALSAR University of Law
about: NALSAR Hyderabad is a leading public law school in Nagirbhavi's sister tier. Celebrated for its stellar campus layout, outstanding moot court cultures, and high-performance corporate placement rates.

reviews.author: Ananya Sen
reviews.text: Excellent debate society and beautiful campus. Placements are extremely robust with all major law firms recruiting here.

name: National Law University Delhi
about: National Law University, Delhi is a premier public law school in Dwarka, New Delhi. Renowned for its outstanding academic standards, specialized research centers, and highly selective admissions via AILET.

reviews.author: Rahul Agrawal
reviews.text: Admissions are incredibly tough via AILET. Dwarka campus has state of the art labs and excellent corporate networks.

name: Symbiosis Law School, Pune
about: Symbiosis Law School Pune is one of the premier private law schools in India. It is renowned for its global curriculum, corporate moot courts, and excellent record of students securing roles in major multinational conglomerates.

reviews.author: Rohini Deshmukh
reviews.text: Pune has an amazing student life, and SLS offers high-quality moot court training and corporate networking.

name: Jindal Global Law School
about: Jindal Global Law School (JGLS) is highly recognized globally for its comprehensive curriculum, international exchange programs, and outstanding placement indices.

reviews.author: Karan Malhotra
reviews.text: Stellar moot court halls, premium global faculty, and top law placements. The infrastructure is top notch.

name: Lady Shri Ram College for Women
about: Lady Shri Ram College for Women (LSR) is a premier constituent college of the University of Delhi. Renowned as one of the finest institutions for liberal arts, social sciences, and commerce, producing pioneering female leaders.

reviews.author: Anushka Sharma
reviews.text: Highly empowering environment. Placement board brings the finest consultancies in India to campus.

name: Presidency University, Kolkata
about: Presidency University (formerly Hindoo College) is a historic public state university in Kolkata. Renowned for its outstanding intellectual heritage, pioneering political movements, and standard liberal education.

reviews.author: Srijit Chatterjee
reviews.text: Unmatched intellectual debate culture. Library houses rare manuscripts and heritage halls are beautiful.

name: Fergusson College Pune
about: Fergusson College is a historic autonomous arts and sciences college in Pune, Maharashtra. Established in 1885 by the Deccan Education Society, it has nurtured multiple prime ministers and writers.

reviews.author: Aditi Deshpande
reviews.text: Fergusson has a legendary campus on FC Road. Outstanding liberal arts culture and excellent psychology departments.

name: Pearl Academy, Delhi
about: Pearl Academy is a premier private design institute in India. Highly recognized for fashion, animation, and interior design portfolios, partnering with top international creative universities.

reviews.author: Priya Sen
reviews.text: Highly commercial and creative. Excellent industry fashion ramps and corporate guest jury sessions.

name: Srishti Manipal Institute of Art, Design and Technology
about: Srishti Manipal is a leading private design school in Yelahanka, Bangalore. Highly recognized for communication design, product design, and creative technology portfolios, with strong roots in Bangalore's tech startup ecosystems.

reviews.author: Neil D'Souza
reviews.text: Srishti focuses on liberal exploration and digital portfolios. The connection to Bangalore startup ecosystems is incredible.
